creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #5)
Thanks for the reply and all the information, Robert.
Puzzling. Even when I miss a pr, I generally receive
summaries of pr's "that need my attention". But I
have no record of this one. :/
No matter now, I guess. I know about it, and I'm
getting all these messages. Maybe an odd hiccup in
bugzilla on this one?

Thanks again! :)

--Chris
